original: a pouch with a number of variously poisoned throwing darts

Purloined from a nuka raider in the Radwoods, this small pouch has a number of slender throwing darts with small, needle-like tips of the type she uses in battle. Unfortunately, the poison has been on them for a while, so it’s likely not as potent as when they were used against you. Even less fortunately: none of the darts are labeled, so it’s anyone’s guess which of her various poisons each one is coated in.
{var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.

original: The dart hits home and, even weakened by time, the toxin-coating goes to work!
